# Bookmarklets

## Legacy

```text
javascript:!function(){try{var e=String(window.getSelection?window.getSelection():"").trim();if(!e)return void alert("\u30c6\u30ad\u30b9\u30c8\u3092\u9078\u629e\u3057\u3066\u304b\u3089\u5b9f\u884c\u3057\u3066\u304f\u3060\u3055\u3044\u3002");function t(e){return String(e).padStart(2,"0")}function r(e){return e.getFullYear()+t(e.getMonth()+1)+t(e.getDate())}function n(e){return r(e)+"T"+t(e.getHours())+t(e.getMinutes())+"00"}var a,i,o,d=e.replace(/[\uff01-\uff5e]/g,function(e){return String.fromCharCode(e.charCodeAt(0)-65248)}).replace(/\u3000/g," ").replace(/\s+/g," ").trim(),s=new Date,c=d.match(/(\d{4})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2}).*?(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/)||d.match(/(\d{4})\u5e74\s*(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5.*?(\d{1,2}):(\d{2})/);if(c)a=new Date(Number(c[1]),Number(c[2])-1,Number(c[3]),Number(c[4]),Number(c[5]),0),(i=new Date(a.getTime())).setMinutes(i.getMinutes()+60),o=!1;else{var u=d.match(/(\d{4})\/(\d{1,2})\/(\d{1,2})/)||d.match(/(\d{4})\u5e74\s*(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5/)||d.match(/(\d{1,2})\u6708\s*(\d{1,2})\u65e5/);if(!u)return void alert("\u65e5\u4ed8\u3092\u8a8d\u8b58\u3067\u304d\u307e\u305b\u3093\u3067\u3057\u305f\u3002\n\u4f8b: 2012/06/30 10:00");a=4===u.length?new Date(Number(u[1]),Number(u[2])-1,Number(u[3])):new Date(s.getFullYear(),Number(u[1])-1,Number(u[2])),(i=new Date(a.getTime())).setDate(i.getDate()+1),o=!0}var g=new URLSearchParams;o?g.set("dates",r(a)+"/"+r(i)):(g.set("dates",n(a)+"/"+n(i)),g.set("ctz","Asia/Tokyo"));var m=String(document.title||"").replace(/\s+/g," ").trim(),l=String(location&&location.href?location.href:""),h=d;l&&(h+="\n\nURL: "+l),g.set("text",(m||d).slice(0,80)),g.set("details",h);var w="https://calendar.google.com/calendar/u/0/r/eventedit?"+g.toString();window.open(w,"_blank","noopener,noreferrer")}catch(f){alert("Bookmarklet\u5b9f\u884c\u30a8\u30e9\u30fc: "+(f&&f.message?f.message:f))}}();
```

## CSP

```text
javascript:!function(){try{var e=String(window.getSelection?window.getSelection():"").trim();if(!e)return void alert("\u30c6\u30ad\u30b9\u30c8\u3092\u9078\u629e\u3057\u3066\u304b\u3089\u5b9f\u884c\u3057\u3066\u304f\u3060\u3055\u3044\u3002");var t=document.createElement("script");t.src="https://oharato.github.io/add-google-calender/csp-runner.js?v=3&t="+Date.now(),t.async=!0,t.dataset.gcalQuickText=encodeURIComponent(e),t.onerror=function(){alert("CSP\u7248\u30e9\u30f3\u30ca\u30fc\u306e\u8aad\u307f\u8fbc\u307f\u306b\u5931\u6557\u3057\u307e\u3057\u305f\u3002")},document.head.appendChild(t)}catch(e){alert("CSP\u7248\u5b9f\u884c\u30a8\u30e9\u30fc: "+(e&&e.message?e.message:e))}}();
```
